language.name: Français
invalid_item: Vous ne pouvez pas interagir avec %s maintenant. Item manquant!
invalid_distance: Vous ne pouvez interagir avec %s maintenant. Trop loin!
invalid_trigger: Cette interaction n'est pas encore disponible!
invalid_done: Vous avez déjà réalisé cette interaction avec %s!
invalid_chest: Vous ne pouvez pas voler %s lorsqu'il/elle est éveillé(e)!
time: Vous êtes arrivés à court de temps!
stories: Il y a encore beaucoup d'histoires à découvrir...
spectator_inv.start: Appuyez sur %1$s pour voir l'inventaire de %2$s!
enable_cmd_blocks: Bloc de commandes are not enabled!
ritual: » The  has completed his ritual. The sun rises again. The druid is gone.
grimsbane_arrives: »  has arrived in . Be wary of approaching him. It would be disastrous if he initiated a fight before you were ready.
delayed_item: » It is %1$s. The %3$s will be done at %2$s!
lumberjack.d: What is it? I'm quite busy if you can't tell. Can you possibly fetch me some ?
lumberjack.n: You must be very brave to come to the  this late.
lumberjack.a1: "Can I have your pioche en pierre?"
lumberjack.2: How did you find that! Here, have my trusty old .
bum.d: I've been living in this  my whole life, but I'm not losing hope! One day, I'll be the richest man in the whole wide world.
bum.n: Taking an evening stroll in the , aren’t ya?
bum.2: Thanks for the , mate! Here's your garbage.
fisher.n: Yeah, yeah, I was wrong. Only caught a  today...
fisher.a1: "Can I borrow your canne à pêche?"
fisher.1.1: Yes, you can! But say, could you go fetch this old fisherman a  first?
fisher.1.2: Ah. Here, take the rod. Thanks for the !
priest.1: Oh? What is this? Huh! The ! The church has been looking for it for centuries!
priest.2: I would do anything for that! You can even get my !
richard.d: Could you help me? I lost a diamant in the  while I was swimming near the big  tree. Do you think you could find it for me?
richard.n: Could you help me, please? I lost a diamant in the  while I was swimming near the  tree earlier. It's getting late already, so do you think you could find it for me?
richard.2: Thanks for that ! Now I can unlock the porte en fer whenever I want to go!
miner.d.1: Mining is tough work, but it keeps me alive. I forgot to bring food with me, and I don't have any time to go get some. Could you fetch me  if I gave you a  in return?
miner.n.1: It can get really lonely down here. Right now, I'm not lonely, but really hungry! Could you please get me some  if I gave you a ?
miner.d2.1: I already ate the  you brought. It was so delicious.
miner.n2.1: I need to go home again soon, but I still haven’t met my quota. Thanks for the  earlier. It was amazing.
miner.1x: I can't eat this! It's as hard as stone. Bring me some fresh  next time!
miner.2: Alrighty, then. There's a lot of minerals in the mine, even some gems. I found a  once... had to give it to the manager of the mine and ended up getting nothing from it. I'm sure there are many more of them, just keep mining.
girl.d: Oh, hello. I found a weird skull in this creepy place. Now I'm really hungry. Do you have some spare  by any chance?
girl.n: Ahh! You scared me. What are you doing out so late? Do you have any ? I've been here for hours!
girl.a1: Trade Pain for Crâne de squelette
druid.a1: Trade Crâne de squelette for Oeil d'araignée fermenté
druid.1: I was trying to summon a , but I got a oeil d'araignée fermenté instead. Take it, I was about to get rid of it anyway...
druid.2: Blood would be better, but I guess redstone works. Take this ficelle as a reward!
witch.d: You... why do you keep coming to me? I am not here just to cure your sick people! And now I couldn't even be able to do that because my chaudron broke!
witch.a1: Trade Oeil d'araignée fermenté for Pioche en diamant
witch.2: A... chaudron. For me? I... you can have those potions...
witch.a3: "Could you enchant my Casque de mailles?"
witch.3: You... I don't just enchant everyone's armor! But I guess I haven't had a nice tarte à la citrouille in a while... bring me a tarte à la citrouille!
witch.a3.1: Give Casque de mailles and Tarte à la citrouille
brewer.a1: Trade Poudre de Blaze for Résistance au feu Potion
brewer.1: Hmm... poudre de blaze? Ah yes, if you give me 2± minutes, then I will have a résistance au feu potion ready for you.
brewer.2: Oh, a plume? If you give me 4± minutes, then I will have a rapidité potion ready for you.
brewer.a3: Trade Carotte dorée for Sauts améliorés Potion
brewer.3: Ah yes, a carotte dorée, what a fine ingredient. If you give me 4± minutes, then I will have a sauts améliorés potion ready for you.
brewer.4: Some sucre and an pomme would make for a great ! It could even wake up my grandma from one of her many naps. If you give me one hour, then I will also make sure that it tastes good.
brewer.a10: Trade Larme de Ghast for Régénération Potion
brewer.7: Oh, a larme de ghast? If you give me 1± minutes, I will have a régénération potion ready for you.
brewer.d.9: The  is under attack by those villains! I wish I could go there, but I was lucky enough to notice them in the cellar and escape to the town.
brewer.n.9: The  is under attack, but even if the  weren’t there, I doubt I could reach it with the monsters that crawl at night.
blacksmith.d.3: How goes it, friend? Ya know, I just found out 'bout this fancy thing called the . Would be fun to make that, wouldn’t it?
blacksmith.n.3: Good evening, friend! Ya know, I just found out about this fancy thing called the . Would be fun to make that, wouldn’t it?
blacksmith.d.9: The poor  got very scared when that invasion started at the . I’m glad he managed to take shelter in the town.
blacksmith.n.9: Ya know, I just want the invasion to end. Can you check out the  and see if ya can do anything about that, my friend?
blacksmith.a1: Buy Unenchanted Casque de mailles for Five
blacksmith.1: A casque de mailles! Quite protective, but difficult to make.
blacksmith.2: Thank you for the , my friend! You know what, you can use the door at the back if you want. Not sure that it’s any use for ya, though. It’s only  back there, and he’s, ya know... odd.
blacksmith.3: What? Did the old  find this? Really, rare gems in the mines? I have to see it myself before I believe any of that!
blacksmith.4: The problem is I need some ruddy poudre de blaze to make one. I haven’t got any, ya know?
blacksmith.a4.1: Give Two Charbon and Poudre de Blaze
blacksmith.5: There you go, my friend, a ! Just be careful, it’s blimmin’ hot.
blacksmith.10: Well, I have no reason to go to that lonely place unless the  finally finds gems. I tell ya, I'd clean up the path myself to see those gems. So far he hasn't sent anyone to show me one. He’s still searching, isn’t he?
farmer.a1: Give Houe en diamant for House Access
adventurer.d: I find many interesting artifacts and gemstones on my travels, so I have lots of rare things to trade. I remember trading nearly everything I found, in , the capital of .
adventurer.d.9: I wish I could stay near my campfire to talk to fellow explorers, but the  are all over the place! I think they are searching the nearby  for treasures.
adventurer.n.9: I wish I could return to my tent to rest, but the  are all over the place! Do they ever sleep?
adventurer.a1: Trade Diamant for Perle de l'Ender
adventurer.1: An perle de l'ender from the ! It's very rare, so don't lose it.
adventurer.2: Actually, yes, I have. Did you know that you can go up the ? I wonder what secrets hide there.
adventurer.4: I have not seen many gemstones around here, but I do know that they are quite rare and expensive. Only the richest folk, like that  fellow, can afford them here, and most of them live in the town. Have you had a chance to talk to ? He lives in the 's backyard.
archaeologist.g1: Now the wall is open, but there's a seal blocking the path. If I'm reading the marks correctly, this seal could be opened with the . Maybe you could get one from the mines?
archaeologist.1: A  can get very handy once I get in there, but it won't be enough to open the door. You can have these bloc d'oss I found in the .
archaeologist.3: A ? Oh, how did you get one so quickly? Hopefully this will work.
merchant1.d: Hello! What can I get you? ? A Épée en diamant?
merchant1.2.1: Hmm... alright! You give me a pelle en diamant and two . Final offer.
merchant1.a2.2: Buy Épée en diamant for Pelle en diamant and Two
merchant1.2.2: Thank you! Here's your Épée en diamant as promised.
enderman.1: The , up at the  near the , told me he likes s. I think that  knows more about s, though. I would love to pick one up someday.
sailor.d: Sailing on this  is quite peaceful. We don't get many storms around here.
sailor.n: We s reach our destination by following the stars at night. I wish I could do that on the sea. It’s not much use on a small  like this.
sailor.g.10: We s reach our destination by following the stars at night. I wish I could do that on the sea. It’s not much use like this.
sailor.d.9: The  took my , and I barely escaped with my life! Luckily the  is frozen, so they can’t go far.
sailor.n.9: I want to return to my , but the  are still around...
sailor.a2: Trade Canne à pêche for Jambières en fer
sailor.2: Thank you! An extra canne à pêche is always handy.
sailor.3: You don't have any ficelle, huh? I think the  at the  up the waterfall sells some!
merchant2.d.g: Hello. That other  has been stealing my customers the whole day. People say she has more than one trade! Unbelievable.
merchant2.d.5: How is this possible! The man with the seau on his head stole my place and my stand. Unbelievable!
merchant2.n.5: I am getting worried that the seau hat man will never leave my stand.
cave_man.a2: Trade Cod for Épée en fer
soldier.a1: Trade Épée en pierre for Bouclier
explorer.d.g: I’m exploring the caves around these parts of the world. They are millions of years old, and many stories lie within them. I wish I had brought more torchees, though... I'm all out!
explorer.n.g: I’m taking a break. I’ve been exploring the caves all day. I found many interesting things in them, but I just wish that I had brought more torchees... I'm all out!
explorer.d.3: I have begun exploring the Nether. Many mysteries go unsolved down here, but I want to get to the bottom of them. I really wish that I had brought more torchees, though... I'm all out!
explorer.n.3: I’m currently taking a break. I’ve been wandering around the Nether all day, and I found many mysterious and fascinating things. I just wish that I had brought more torchees, though... I'm all out!
explorer.d.4: I have begun exploring l'end. Many mysteries go unsolved here, but I want to get to the bottom of them. I really wish that I had brought more torchees, though... I'm all out!
explorer.n.4: I’m currently taking a break. I’ve been wandering around l'end all day, and I found many mysterious and fascinating things. I just wish that I had brought more torchees, though... I'm all out!
explorer.d.5: This seems to be a wall of slime. I have spent hours trying to remove it with my hands but to no avail. Maybe you have something that could help?
explorer.n.5: This seems to be a wall of slime. I have spent the whole day trying to remove it with my hands but to no avail. Maybe you have something that could help?
explorer.d.7: A fallen tree seems to be blocking this passage. If only I had some cisailles, I could probably remove some of the leaves.
explorer.n.7: I've been trying to break these leaves all day, but I’m not going to get far without a pair of cisailles.
explorer.d.9: I really want to explore the caves around the world, but the  could come at any time. I hope they won’t destroy anything else.
explorer.n.9: The  are very strong and could come at any time! Just look at how they vandalized that windmill!
explorer.1: Thank you! Now I can continue my exploration. Here, have these bottes en fer.
explorer.2: Ah, I can use this to remove the slime!
explorer.3: These s aren't very durable, but I’m sure I can remove a bit of slime with it!
explorer.6: An ? A shiny, glimmering ... ehm...  alright, alright.
explorer.a8: "Where can I get a pair of cisailles?"
diver.d: Oh, I didn't expect to see another person down here. My  broke, and I was only just about able to get to this place before the water began to leak in.
diver.n2: Thanks again for the redstone earlier! I was able to fix my  because of it.
diver.d.9: Oh no, oh no, we're under attack! They even took control of the 's !
diver.n.9: Oh no, oh no, is anyone doing anything to stop this?! I've not been able to calm down ever since I saw that Illusionniste on the  this morning.
diver.a1: Trade Redstone for Casque en fer
evoker.n: Don't even think that you can stay for the night! This is my place, not yours. Go back to the  where you came from.
evoker.d.9: Have you seen this incredible ? I found it myself. I'm the best. I look like a real !
evoker.n.9: Don't even think that you can get my . It is mine, not yours.
evoker.a1.1: Buy Totem d'immortalité for Bloc d'or
evoker.1.1: This is the easiest  I've ever made! I get these totems for free, didn't you know?
evoker.3: If you want my incredible , you'll have to give me something equally amazing. How about you fetch me the 's !
evoker.4: I can't believe you gave me this incredible hat for that worthless !
mourner.n2: The  is such a peaceful place. I hope the dead also find their peace.
mourner.1: A... totem... is that possible? To resurrect? You don't know how much this means to me... here, have this !
digger.n: People say being in the  at night is scary! They think I'm crazy too. And I just like walking there, it's peaceful.
digger.1: That's a lovely . Perfect color! Beautiful...
baker.d.g: Welcome to the ! Here we bake the best cookies and gâteaus in the whole wide world!
baker.g.3: Oh no! My poor bakery... I’m glad that I still have some spare cookies that I can sell to get money for the repair.
baker.1: Here’s your cookie! Come back again!
baker.a2: "Can you bake me fresh pain with this ?"
baker.2: Yes, here we bake the best pain! Just come back in an hour and your pain should be ready!
baker.2.1: There you go, one piece of !
baker.a3: Buy Tarte à la citrouille for Three
butcher.d: These lapins keep hopping and squeaking all over the place! Absolutely maddening!
butcher.n: Do lapins ever sleep? I can't sleep if they keep jumping all over me!
worker.d: What do you want? Open the door? Why should I do that? There's no reason to! Well, if I got some cookies or a nice new bow...
worker.2: This is a nice arc. Okay, I'll open it.
guard.1: Oh wow, I already feel so much better. I guess you want some type of reward? Here, take this gate . I think it's used for the gate in the forest.
apple.d: Pommes! Pommes! Aah, I just love pommes! Pommes for everyone!
carrot.d: Carottes! Carottes! Aah, I just love carottes! Carottes for everyone!
carrot.1: I've never been better! Carottes! Carottes! I just love carottes!
carrot.2: Oh, don't worry. This is just my Halloween costume. Do you also want a carotte? The color and smell of carottes is just astounding. I love carottes.
carrot.a3: Give Arc, Crâne de squelette and three Flèches
carrot.3: Thank you! This costume is even better than the one I had! I did take all of the 's carottes for my old costume, so I guess you can have them now...
brother.d.7: Puff puff, I am a poisson-globe, hehe. I was going to go trick or treating, but I can’t find my sister. Maybe if I find a present for her, she will show up. Do you have anything?
brother.d.9: I like costumes, and with a good enough one you could probably sneak past the  at the . I'm too scared to try it myself, though.
brother.n.9: I wonder if the  could be fooled with a costume. It's probably too late to try it now, though.
brother.1: Thank you! You can have some of my sucre. I already ate a lot of it anyway!
skeleton.d: Would you like some flèches? In your body.
mayor.d: Hello! I am the second  of .
mayor.n: Good evening! It's nice being the  of this town, but sometimes there's just too much to do...
mayor.1: Of course! Help is always appreciated here. You just need to get some briques from the shed next to the old s grave. Here's the  to open it. Don’t lose it!
mayor.2: Want to play a game of ? I am the best player in this town, and I bet my hat you can't get one of your white pieces onto the other side before me.
mayor.6: Ha! I get to keep my title of the best  player in town!
mayor.d.9: Hello! Due to the invasion, we can't open the gates today. Luckily, the  can't get past these walls.
mayor.n.9: Good evening! The  still aren't gone. Hopefully, they will give up soon.
astronomer.a1: "Within three hours, a  will come down."
astronomer.1: If there was a , I would have already seen it in my telescope. Stop lying. I was just about to give you my valuable pet, but I am not giving it to a liar.
astronomer.5: The  has already crashed today an hour after noon! Stop lying to me, I do not have time for this! You could have gotten my pet, but I am not giving it to a liar.
thief.d: Hey, listen! You better not tell anyone that you saw me here. I'll give you a potion if you keep quiet.
thief.n: Shh! Do not tell anyone I was here, okay? I'll give you a potion if you don't!
pigman.g: I know because I live here. I wouldn't suggest being around here without a résistance au feu potion. Humans, like you, tend to burn...
pigman.g3: If you want to get past this gate you will have to find another path.
pigman.g4: The Nether is a dangerous place.
pigman.1: You have a ? Go ahead and use the gate, then.
pigman.2: You can give me a , and I'll let you through. Here in the Nether, we use them as a form of payment, but they need to be forged like any other coin. No, I don't know how to do that myself.
pigman.3: Why would you want to? Humans, like you, tend to burn... but, perhaps a arpenteur is what you're looking for.
wife.n.7: Hey! Enjoying the night, or is it too spooky? Remember not to stay up all night, or the scary zombies will come and get you.
wife.n.9: Oh my goodness! Why hasn't someone stopped the invasion already?
rose.d: I really enjoy s; their color and their smell are just astounding! The only problem is that s are not edible, and I am getting a bit hungry.
rose.n: s look so beautiful in the light of the moon. We should really appreciate them more. The only problem is that s are not edible, and I haven’t eaten all day.
rose.d2: I really enjoy s; their color and their smell are just astounding!
rose.n2: s look so beautiful in the light of the moon. We should really appreciate them more.
rose.1: Oh, how nice of you. I can use this to make some carotte stew. You can have my  cutter cisailles. Hopefully, you will put it to good use.
time_traveller.d: I really need to get back to my own time, this place is so primitive! I really wish I knew how to get back. Maybe one of those green gemstones… what were they called again… Émeraudes! Yeah, maybe one of those could be used for my time travelling machine?
time_traveller.n: This place is so boring and primitive! I could be home now, watching the Shrooball game on my televisor. Maybe one of those green gemstones could get me home? Émeraudes, I believe they are called?
time_traveller.1: I’ve never seen one of these in person, I’ve only seen them in museums. Interesting. I guess I’ll be able to use this. You can take this potion. It’s quite good at keeping people awake, and it even tastes like pommes.
graveyard.g2: What? But... but I got a !
graveyard.1: Ah, what's this? Orders from the ? Let me see!
marhjo.d: Excuse me? Uhm, not to annoy you, but are you able to help me with something? As you can see, I've been in a... ehmm... "work" accident. Can you bring me a ?
marhjo.n: Help me... I've been stuck in this pile since 3:±±! Can you bring me a , please?
mctsts.1: Oh, you have my repeater! Take this plastron en diamant!
ttextt.1: Oh, a new rhythm to listen to? Here, you can have my  for that!
ghast.g: The Nether is now under my protection!
hermit.d.1: The other day, I heard that something happened in the mine. It was a gravier cave-in. There must be something behind it.
hermit.n.1: There was a gravier cave-in in the mines, but right now it's probably too late to check it out...
hermit.d.g: Last night, I read the stars, and according to them, a comet will land near  one hour after noon. I could be wrong though.
hermit.1: Thank you! Here, take this potion. I'll go plant my hundredth tree now!
hermit.2: Good, you're starting to learn! Now, take this teinture jaune.
dockmaster.d: One time, there was an accident where  was stuck in my balloon for over two days.  has never been the same since that day.
dockmaster.2: Hmm, if you want a ride, I would need some fuel. I think 16 charbon would do.
checkminer.n: I haven't eaten all day, except my three breakfasts, four lunches, and two dinners. Oh, and five slices of gâteau, of course.
mrk.1: Thanks! Here, have these pants. What? I can't even understand this language... this livre is boring too!
mrk.2: Thanks! Here, have these pants. What? This livre is boring too!
ghost_queen.d: Come along with me to the !
ghost_queen.d2: Hello, my dear... I have come from beyond. I am the . One of my sweet spirits has asked for you!
ghost_queen.n: Have you talked to  yet? He has grave news for you...
ghost2.d: Life as a  is so boring. I'm happy the Queen plays with us sometimes, though.
ghost2.n: The Queen is like a mother to us. She takes care of all of us s.
ghost_mayor.d: Hello! I used to be the  of Glarthford.
ghost_mayor.n: Good evening! It was nice being  of this town, but being a  is a lot less work...
viktor.d: How is it possible for a man such as  to take over a whole kingdom by himself?
viktor.n: You need to fight ! So much of  is nothing but a pile of ashes now. The same fate will befall  if you do not hurry!
percival.1: Greetings, adventurer. I am King  the First of . Once, my kingdom was peaceful and prosperous, rich beyond your imagination, the biggest kingdom of the world. But now... so much of it is nothing but ruins and ashes. I have come to warn you...
percival.2: About a decade ago, a criminal came from across the , . He impersonated my son and killed me. Before, the kingdom had blossomed, but once he took over, everything changed for the worse. My wife, , started a resistance, , but alas, eventually they were all killed as well. I've come to bring you grave news.
percival.3: will not stop with ! He wants an empire of ruins, the whole world. You %s stop him! Promise me! You must find three of the elemental s to create a weapon that is powerful enough to stop the monster  has become!
percival.a4: Give Épée en diamant and Three s
percival.4: Here, a weapon powerful enough to defeat . Only you can end this suffering now. Be strong, be brave!
helene.d: killed every member of our resistance, . We tried to stop him, we really did...
helene.1: Unfortunately, I cannot help you much, but I do know that an ordinary human being would not be able to handle the power of the s.
slime.3: Go, my slime! Stick, stick! Stick them to the ground!
ender_priest.3: The End Disease is better than the 'great' invasion!
ender_priest.l2: You can't get through this . Don't bother trying!
ender_priest.l3: Alright, you broke my . Now come and fight me!
netheran.i: Haha! You want to fight me? You stand no chance! Maybe I will fight you if you can defeat my two blazes!
blaze1.n: has ordered me to guard the Nether. I won't let you past me!
citizen.d.2: This is dreadful! What, haven't you heard? The  stole the fireworks we were going to use for the parade! I heard he lives in a cave near the !
citizen.n.2: Dear me, it's getting late. I fear we aren't going to get the fireworks from the  in time! Someone has to get to the cave urgently!
citizen.d.3: I heard that the  is making résistance au feu potions today. With all of these fires, it might be worth checking out.
citizen.n.3: The  sold résistance au feu potions today, but I doubt you can still get into the  this late.
citizen.d.5: The  keeps rambling about some s? I fear he may have gone insane.
citizen.n.5: Good evening! Have you seen the  recently? He's up in his  rambling about s. Maybe somebody should check on him.
citizen.d.7: Apparently, the  has some sort of ancient key? He’s not sure what it's for, but surely it must be important. Oh, and I nearly forgot: Happy Halloween!
citizen.n.7: Yesterday the  showed me this strange ancient key. I wonder what it is... I would ask him, but it's Halloween!
citizen.d.9: Dear me, the Pillards have turned the windmill into their outpost!
citizen.n.9: This is dreadful! The invasion still hasn't been stopped!
uncle.d.2: Good day! You know, there’s a thing that’s been troubling me for a while now. I keep hearing weird noises every time I go sit by the . I know I sound mad but I swear it’s as if someone’s up there...
uncle.n.2: Good evening! I’m having some trouble sleeping. I just can’t stop thinking about the . I swear someone is up there. I wish I could go see for myself, but my knees are too feeble to get up there.
uncle.d.4: I think this is it. The disease has taken all my strength, I can't go any further. You must save the others from it. Promise me you will. I know the  has access to the . I believe the source of the disease lies in there. Go, now!
uncle.n.4: I- just go! Go to the ... I'll be fine. I’m always fine.
uncle.d.5: Nasty business, this. A slime came from the  and polluted much of the food! The volcano can be accessed by diving into the , but nobody has been brave enough yet...
uncle.n.5: If we don't do anything soon, the slime will come back... and maybe he might not just pollute the food this time...
uncle.e.6: What a terrible occurrence! All of this reminds me of what happened only a couple of years ago, over in the forest at . Nasty business.
uncle.d.7: Hello there. Have you seen the ? I’ve been told that the Halloween decoration is marvelous up there!
uncle.n.7: Halloween night is great! Have you been up to the ? The decoration is amazing, I’ve heard.
uncle.e.8: Thank you. Your potion saved my life!
uncle.d.9: The  managed to escape the  safe and sound. Sadly, the  was killed by the , and I doubt anyone besides a pillager can enter the  now.
uncle.d.8: Hello there. Earlier today I was in the nether, for... reasons... anyway, that's not important. However, I got into an accident as you can probably see. Could you make me a régénération potion using a larme de ghast?
uncle.n.8: Good evening! I'm starting to hurt quite... quite a bit. Could you make me a régénération potion using a larme de ghast?
grimsbane.d: I have destroyed ! Do you really think you are worthy of fighting me?
grimsbane.l: How? This doesn't make any sense! I destroyed ! How could you beat me?
pufferfish.2: Puff! Baby back! Puff! Yes! Puff! Take Eponge!
pufferfish_red.d: Puff! Met friend? Puff! In ! Puff.
pufferfish_red.g2: Puff! Scary grim man! Puff! Hiding nearby. Puff.  can help! Puff!
ent.d: Greetings. I do not have time to talk now. Something terrible has happened! A branch of the  has been cut off. This is unacceptable.
ent.n: I do not know how we will ever calm the  down! Why can the mortals not leave us in peace? We have been here longer than anyone.
ent.d2: Greetings. Hast thou returned the  to the ?
ent.n2: Hast the  calmed down? Why can the mortals not leave us in peace?
ent_king.d: I do not wish to talk with you mortals! One of your younglings stole a  of mine! Thou hast no idea what kind of power the  holds within it!
ent_king.n: A mortal dared to plunder a  of mine! I shall not allow this behaviour!
ent_king.n2: Thank thee for thy effort in finding my . Thou hast proven to me that not all mortals are narrow.
ent_king.1: Yes, thou hast returned it! I shall destroy this before anyone can receive my powers from it. I shall evermore be in thy debt. The  of the earth is thine!
ent_king.2: Hmm... the , thou speak of? The magick Membrane of Phantom mayhaps is what thou seek. Yes, such substance can reveal even the most hidden of entities. We live in terrible times, however. My young entlings have such trouble growing. I cannot help but to expect something in return. Bring me dusted bones of a squelette, and I shall lend you it. Mayhaps a  would know how to dust the oss of a squelette.
ent_king.3: I thank thee. Thou may use my Membrane to reveal the secrets. Hold it near where thou believe the  hides.
sprite.d: I keep injuring my wings, but I can never find enough plumes to fix them...
sprite.n: I wish my plumes grew faster so that I wouldn't need to search for plumes to fix my wings...
sprite.n2: Thanks for the plumes! I just wish my wings grew faster...
sprite.g3: Oh, no!  saw the , and, well, he fled. I, I didn't see where he went, I was too busy, umm, taking care of my wings… some of the other holders of the essences surely saw him, though! Maybe the  in the ? Or the  in the forest!
sprite.1: I can fly well again! My wing doesn't hurt anymore! The  of air is yours!
demon.d: This druid fool has got no clue what he's doing! I felt a weak summoning and decided to check it out. But no, it’s not a big powerful druid, it’s just another foolish child testing out sacred summoning rituals. The worst thing is that I can't get back home, because I'm all out of poudre de blaze!
demon.n: Oh, c'mon, I'm so sick of this! I have to sit here watching this idiot try and summon me because I'm out of poudre de blaze and can’t go home.
bucketm.e: The fire is gone! The s save the day once again!
bucketm.d: The other  was kind enough to lend me his stand, so now I am here. I sell buckets. The best seaus: s!
bucketm.n: I like evenings, and it only gets better with s.
bucketm.1: A perfect seau takes a bit of time to make. Give me an hour and I will have a beautiful  ready!
bucketm.2: Always a pleasure to supply the world with s!
bucketm.3: You might want to look around at the . Water creatures often carry Éponges around, but maybe I can draw your interest to a  instead?
bowm.d: Hello there, can I interest you in a new arbalète? This one has a very sturdy foregrip and the ficelle has been made from the finest silk!
bowm.n: Good evening, you look like someone who could use a arbalète. This one has a sturdy foregrip and the ficelle has been made from the finest silk! The durability is excellent!
bowm.d.9: Hello there. I was going to buy this old stand, but everyone is distracted by the invasion.
bowm.n.9: Good evening. You look like someone who could use a couple of fine flèches! I was going to sell a few, but because of the invasion, I can't buy this stand yet.
bowm.2: Here you go, the finest flèche gold can buy!
bowm.3: You don’t know how to use a arc? Let me show you!
bowm.4: You don’t seem to own a arc, and I don’t have any spare ones. Maybe you'd like to purchase a arbalète instead?
bowm.5: You don't seem to own a arc, and I don't have any spare ones. Maybe another time?
bowm.tbc1: You can only use the arc attack as long as you have flèches. I have given you a few, so you can try it out!
bowm.tbc2: After selecting the arc you want to use, an flèche will show up. Simply scroll to it and right-click as quickly as you can! Then, another flèche will show up, which you can click once again.
drowned.n: The  is one of my favorite places in the evening... not that I could go anywhere else...
creeper.d: Tssss... hey! I almost managed to sneak up on the ...
spigman.d: This is not the Nether...? Whatever... die!
miller.d: Hey! Are you in need of some ? The mill is running, but I wish the wind would pick up a bit. A nice big storm would be perfect, don’t you think?
miller.d.9: I hope the  cannot reach me here, otherwise I’d be screwed!
miller.n.9: How can those citizens stay outside at a time like this?! They should take shelter just like me. The  could sneak up on us at any time!
miller.a1: "Can you grind this blé for me?"
miller.1b: Yeah, sure! It's quite windy, so I think I can have your  ready in about an hour.
miller.1c: Of course! Haven't seen this much wind in  for a long time. Your  should only take around 2± minutes now.
monk.d: The  once told me that the  was lost. The truth is, I mistook that old thing for junk and gave it to the  at the . Bless his soul.
monk.d.9: I hope the  didn't find the  while raiding the , or who knows what punishment will be sent!
monk.n.9: The  should be asleep right now, but I doubt those evil-doers will sleep.
monk.1: There is a  north-west of the town. The old  has lived there most of his life.
miner_chief.d: Do you see that patch of diorite over there? Yeah, I've been trying to break through it all day. I wasn't very successful, as you can see… maybe TNT could do the trick?
miner_chief.n: I'm getting tired, but I'm not giving up yet. There has to be a way to break through that diorite. Maybe with TNT?
miner_chief.g2: The wall is open, but there's nothing here except chauve-souriss! What a waste of our time! I hope they stay in there because I just can't stand being near them.
miner_chief.d.9: I doubt the  could reach my mine due to that gravier cave-in, but better safe than sorry!
miner_chief.n.9: I'm not afraid of those , but this late in the night it's better if I hide from the chauve-souriss.
miner_chief.a1: "Where could I get the necessary items for TNT?"
miner_chief.1: Down the wagonnet track there's a poudre à canon storage. But I’m afraid to enter it... it’s filled with chauve-souriss! There might also be some sable around here, but it’s no use without a proper tool to gather it.
miner_chief.2: Thank you! This should take care of the diorite.
miner_chief.tbc1: To defeat the , we have to fight her in turns while everything else is paused.
miner_chief.tbc3: It looks like you don't have a weapon. Don’t worry, I can lend you my pioche en pierre.
miner_chief.tbc4: We need to be careful! The  also gets a turn.
miner_chief.tbc5: I have good news, though! Iron nuggets mean an attack is blockable. Simply right-click as soon as they turn into lingot de fers, and you will not be damaged!
miner_chief.tbc8: Look at an enemy while holding the Étiquette and right-click to change the target of your attacks!
miner_chief.tbc9: '' are just one of the options you have. There are other attacks such as ',' which are more difficult to execute.
miner_chief.tbc10: You can use my  to try it out. After selecting it in the '' submenu, you will have to right-click as many times as you can to power the attack.
miner_chief.tbc11: s can often be obtained by defeating enemies. They apply different effects and deal area of effect damage.
miner_chief.tbc12: Each attack is also explained in your inventaire when hovering over the item.
miner_chief.tbc13: You also need to keep , the counterpart to , in mind. Each attack requires , which is regenerated each turn. You can also eat food using '.'
miner_chief.tbc14: If you don't have any food or , you can skip your turn using '.' You regenerate when you have a lot of , so eat as much food as you can!
gunpowder_warden.d: Poudre à canon? No, I can't give you any! Well, clean this mess of webs up, and I might give you some.
gunpowder_warden.n: What do you want this late? Poudre à canon? Alright, clean these webs and I might give you some!
gunpowder_warden.a1: Trade Two Toile d'araignée for Poudre à canon
gunpowder_warden.1: Fine, here’s your poudre à canon! Now get lost!
bat.l: No! My chauve-souriss will avenge me!
bat.1: Chauve-souriss! Come and defend your Empress!
sorcerer.1: Very well. It ends here then. But, remember: il y a encore beaucoup d'histoires à découvrir!
ender_guard3.g: Li y a erocne puocuaeb d'seriotsih a rirvuoced.
ender_guard6.g: Tahw era uoy gniod ereh?! Era uoy gniyrt ot retne eht 's noisnam?
ender_guard8.g: Uoy'er ton na Namredne, era uoy?
akid.d: This is my waiting spot. Sorry, can’t move. I have to stand right here, nowhere else. I’m waiting for my best friend in the whole world! I can unlock the shed for you if you have the , but I still won’t move.
cedric.cut2: My master, the , and I were trying out a rather new and unstable spell, and because of me and my clumsiness, I destroyed everything.
necromancer.l: H-how! I shouldn’t have been able to be defeated like this. I am the ! You won… this time...
necromancer.cut1: Oh, look who is here! My 'beloved' apprentice, , who was so kind to get us all killed! Now you get to feel how we all felt!
necromancer.cut3: Someone is still here? I thought they would have tried to escape by now, but I guess they have a death wish! You are joining  then!
maid.d: What is going on? My body feels weak, like I’ve been asleep for years, but it was just the other day that I was preparing dinner for the  and , wasn’t it?
maid.n: The  took care of the s and butlers like we were family… I can’t imagine him turning evil...
grandma.d: Hello there, young one. I hope you are having a marvelous day! I was planning to collect some pommes today, but, oh, I am so tired.
grandma.d2: That potion you gave me was wondrous! Do you have any more?
grandma.n2: I do not think I will fall asleep before I get home tonight. Thank you for the lovely potion, dear!
grandma.1: Oh my, what is this wondrous drink? It tastes like pommes… oh my! What is this rush I am feeling? I feel like I could stay awake for weeks! Here, have my old . I won't need them for the time being!
zombie_villager.g: I used to be a bibliothécaire. Now, a chapter of my life may have ended, but it's not the end of my story.
ender_zombie.d: They call me the , for I am the end of all things!
zombie_s2.g: You know what? I reckon, I reckon, that if you went over to that citrouille-headed one over there. Yeah, the one who's pretending to be a citrouille? I reckon she's got something nice for you. I think she's got a good treat. I reckon she's got something. Yeah. That'd be fun.
pzombie.n: You probably thought I was a citrouille, but I am actually a deadly zombie!
snowman.d: Hey, you! Could you maybe help me? I lost my nose, and I, uh, can’t find a suitable replacement for it! Could you get me a carotte? I am too scared of melting to go look for one myself...
snowman.d2: Thanks for the carotte! Now I look like a real !
snowman.n2: Thanks for the carotte! Now I look like a real ! And, I'm looking forward to showing it off tomorrow!
snowman.1: Oh, wow! This carotte’s a great nose! I have this  that I, well, kinda tried to use as a nose… you can guess how that went. You’re so nice, so why don’t you take it.
skeleton2.d: I bet you can’t even dodge a boule de neige! Now try to dodge this!
skeleton2.n: Good evening! Would you like an flèche… in your face?
magma_cube.d: You couldn’t even beat a normal slime if you tried! Now try to beat me!
sleepless_m.n: Oh I got it! Those so-called people aren't really people! They're actually zombies! But to be honest, I don't care, please quiet them down, I just want to sleep.
sleepless_m.1: Finally, some silence! At least now I can peacefully fail to sleep. Uh, here, you can have this... uh, . It has some green goo on it that I can't get off... careful with that, I guess.
trader.a1: Buy Casque de mailles for Five
trader.1: A casque de mailles for you, my dear customer!
trader.a2: Buy Oeil d'araignée fermenté for One Émeraude
trader.2: Here is your Oeil d'araignée fermenté!
trader.a3: Buy Épée en diamant for Three Redstone
trader.3: A Épée en diamant! Very high quality, cheap price. Just for you!
trader.a4: Buy Casque en or for Two
adri.1: Oh wow! You have a dog? Unbelievable! Could I have him? Right now I'd give anything in the world to have a dog, even my most treasured arbalète.
adri.2: Really?! You mean it?! This has been by far the best thing that has happened to me since I entered this godforsaken cave! Here, have my master arbalète, but be careful, it's quite tricky to use. And treat it well!
adri.animal.cruelty: What did you just do? Get out of here right now, you monster! I still have plenty of arbalètes to shoot you with!
villager.d: Yes, I'm also a raider! Oh, wait... you're not one of them, are you? You see, I noticed a  taking some of their  before... maybe he's still around.
villager.n: Yes, I'm also a raider! Oh, wait... You're not one of them, are you? You see, this morning a  took some of their ... it was a while ago, but maybe he's still around.
gibbs.1: Oh, a tooth. Thank you! That works. In return, you can have my . Don't ask how I got it... there was an accident.
gibbs.quickfast: Oh, I see, so you do know. Well, I guess, uh, I should give you this bee staff anyway, because I'm not entirely sure what the consequences would be if I didn't. Uh, oh yeah, also, I've been wondering, do you have any influence over these s?
gibbs.quickfast.later: I've been wondering, do you have any influence over these s?
gibbs.quickfast.reply.2: I see. Hmm. Well, prove it to me. Make it that festival time. And, collect a . I'll be waiting up at the statue. Just go to the tower and look at me with a longue-vue or something and I'll come to you.
gibbs.tbc1: If you were to die right now, would that fix this ?
suso.g: Oh, someone's here. I need... a fish. Yeah. You see, I used to be a chat. You'd be surprised with the kinds of magic some people practice around here. Anyways, would you be so kind to bring me a fish to eat?
suso.gary.3: What is everyone doing here? Is this some sort of cult? Can't a chat just hide in peace?
jerozgen.d: I'm usually busy translating old books for the , but today there hasn't been any work. If you need anything translated, just let me know!
jerozgen.2: There you go! It seems to be a small collection of .
jerozgen.a2: "Go to the sewers, or I'll burn down the "
evil_ts.1: What is happening here? This isn't  II, what are you doing here?
evil_ts.tbc4.a: You being here in  X is fundamentally incompatible with how a playthrough of this map should reasonably operate. This is a  II area!
federick.d: Hmm, what a bunch of creeps, standing around in this fog with zombie costumes on! I'd laugh if one turned out to be real.
federick.n: The dusk has started to make me hallucinate. I could've sworn I just saw a person with a zombie costume attack someone...?!
pillager1.d: 'Was told not to drink any of that - tastes so good! Said don't drink no , is what he said.
pillager2.d: The  is now ours! Soon, we will rule everything!
pillager2.n: This invasion is going well. When the sun rises again, we will be victorious.
pillager3.d: That  would be perfect for my honeymoon!
pillager4.d: Such a perfect place to invasion! Look at all those pommes!
pillager4.n: I can't believe we didn't invasion this place earlier!
pillager_s1.d: I don't know how to use a arbalète, could you maybe give me your weapon?
pillager_s1.n: It's getting late and I couldn't do anything today. I don't even know how to use a arbalète...
pillager_s1.1: Thank you! Finally, I can help! Here, take my arbalète!
pillager_s2.d: Good day! I'm the new  here!
pillager_s2.n: Oi, I'm the new ! What are you doing here at this time?
pillager_s3.d: This  attacked me and stole all my coins! He ran towards the farm... someone has to stop him! I just cannot stand this sort of criminal behavior.
pillager_s3.n: This morning a  stole all my coins. He ran towards the farm, but nobody has tracked him down yet! I have no respect for criminals.
illusioner1.d: The  is so pretty! What a shame that it's all frozen, so we can't move the .
illusioner1.n: Even at night, I like the view at the . Sadly, we can't move the  because the  is frozen.
illusioner_s.d: Ruches are amazing for raiding! I can throw them around!
illusioner_s.n: I would've already taken the ruche, but those abeilles… they could sting me at any time!
illusioner_s.g2: Where did the ruche go?! I was going to use it for the invasion...
illusioner_s.a1: ☠ "Can you teach me how to throw a ruche?" ☠
illusioner_s.1: You don't know how to throw a ruche? Well, I should probably be killing you, but I can't miss this chance to teach you!
illusioner_s.tbc1: With the throwable attack, you can throw a variety of objects such as ruches. Most objects can only be thrown once and then are lost. What a shame.
illusioner_s.tbc4: This attack is by far the strongest one available, but can be quite difficult to execute. It would be a shame to waste a ruche for training, so I have given you a couple of eggs that you can use for now!
vindicator1.d: Nothing gives me more strength than the sound of alambics in the morning.
vindicator1.n: I told my friend downstairs to not drink any , next thing he does is drink it. How is he supposed to guard now?
vindicator2.d: This  is such a mess! I hope we can still find some treasures in it.
vindicator2.n: This  is so messy, but at least it’s not as overgrown as the forest.
vindicator3.d: You may not enter the ! This is our camp now.
vindicator3.n: Don't think you can sneak past me in the darkness. The  is our camp now!
vindicator_s.d: The  said that a  was going to strike in this forest before she ran away, but who cares!
vindicator_s.d2: The  did strike at 13:±±! She was right after all! Well, I guess this is a good sign for our next invasion!
vindicator_s.n: At least the  lights up this place! Fire is great in invasions.
bannerman_illusioner.d: You're telling me you want my ? Well, you can have it. But first, you'll have to defeat me!
bannerman_illusioner.n: Do you think I'm too tired to fight at night? Shame on you, because you can't have my  even at this time!
bannerman_pillager.d: The air is so fresh up here... but you want my ? Well, I'd like to see you try!
bannerman_pillager.n: What a starry night, I feel like I could touch the moon. Oh, you want my ? Well, I'd like to see you try!
bannerman_vindicator.d: As long as our leader is alive, I'll never give up my duty to protect the !
bannerman_vindicator.n: You want my ? It may be getting late, but as long as our leader is alive we'll never give up, and you won't get my !
pillager_guard1.d: Halt! I can't allow you to enter. Nobody may enter the  while the invasion is in progress.
pillager_guard1.n: Halt! It's late, but the invasion is still in progress. Nobody may enter the .
pillager_guard1.1: I'm not allowed to let anyone in! The only way anyone is getting into the  is if they break-in. Luckily for me, you don't look like much of a . Funnily enough, that Pillard over there near the ruins actually got attacked by a  earlier.
pillager_guard2.d: I'm guarding the . Only his  may enter, and you're clearly not one.
pillager_guard2.n: It's night-time, but I'm always guarding the . If you're not a , you have to stay out.
pillager_guard2.1: Of course. I would never let a  wait.
pillager_guard2.1x: Definitely not. You don't have a familiar face, a arbalète, or even a . Any real  would possess all three.
pillager_guard2.1x2: Definitely not. Any real  would possess a familiar face, a arbalète, and a .
pillager_advisor2.n: Perhaps you should call the  to help you out, because you stand no chance against our captain, haha!
ender_architect.g: I tsuj dehsinif gnidliub siht ! Ti lliw evas su morf gnillaf otni eht diov!
ender_merchant.1: Thank you! Here, take this Chorus as a reward!
enderman_s1.g: Hi. I have a problem. The shulkers keep teleporting all over l'end! Unbelievable and absolutely maddening!
enderman_s1.1: Impressive! That's one less shulker in the world. Here, take this!
enderman_s2.g: Why, why do I have to be so bored. Some chorus would be so much fun right now. No, that's nonsense. I don't have any with me...
ender_guard_s.g: I'm os yrgnuh! Fi uoy gnirb em a surohc etalce, I'll tel uoy hguorht, neve hguoht uoy'er a namuh!
piglin1.g.8: Ooh, what a fancy armor! Welcome to the Nether, friend!
piglin2.g: Hey, there! Thanks again for helping me with the ghast earlier!
piglin2.g2: That totem d'immortalité is so cool! I think I want to see the overworld myself!
piglin2.g3: I convinced the others to go visit the overworld! I still can't believe totem d'immortalités are real!
piglin2.g4: Is this where you are going to save your ? This is so exciting!
piglin2.a: Go away! I'm busy with my new larme de ghast!
piglin2.1: Thanks for killing that ghast for me! This larme de ghast is now mine!
piglin2.a2: "My 's injured and to survive he needs a larme de ghast!"
piglin2.4: Fine. Here, in the Nether we sometimes find pomme dorées. They are rare magical golden items! If you can bring me something similar, but from the overworld, I might change my mind.
piglin4.g: Welcome! I heard you helped the little one with that ghast, that was lurking around here! We really appreciate your help!
piglin5.g: Hello there! Some of the other residents of the Nether are pretty unfriendly, but you don't have to worry about that with us!
piglin8.a: An outsider! Who do you think you are, walking around here? I'm going to show you what we do to your kind in the Nether!
piglin7.g: I can't believe he lied! He told me he's from the Nether, but in reality, he's from the overworld! And now, to make matters worse, my little boy ran off to stab him with a knife!
piglin7.1: There is that one piglin that may be of help to you. The others don't like him, so he stays away. I think he sometimes is at 's place.
piglin6.g: Welcome to the Nether! If you've already met the other piglins, ignore them! Those guys only talk with people in full gold armor and they kicked me out because I'm friendly to everyone!
piglin6.a1: Trade  for three pieces of Golden Armor
piglin6.1: Thanks! I haven't had some good  in a while. Those other piglins won't let me go near them or the hoglins. Here, you can have this golden armor!
hint.equipment2: » It looks like this  still needs to be enchanted!
hint.ascension_key: » It looks like this gate is locked, and a normal  probably won't suffice. Who could be responsible for guarding a fitting ?
hint.mourner: » At the sight of the head, the  fainted.
hint.bee: » It looks like the ruche can be knocked down!
hint.kid: » The disease is dangerous! Is the wait worth the deaths it may cost? If you really need briques, you should probably look for another type of block instead.
hint.checkpoint: » An  has been activated. If you fall into the void, you will be respawned at the most recently activated !
multiplayer.disconnect.flying: Kicked for flying/standing on a character
lore.newspaper.6.1: Ancient creatures come back to life,
lore.newspaper.8.2: each. Find us in the swamp!
lore.mletter.4: find any I'll send someone to %s
lore.key.1: You can use this to access
tip3: Tip: By using s, you can travel back in time by one hour!
tip4: Tip: A balise shows where you need to go!
tip7: Tip: By using s, you can travel forwards in time by one hour! This way, you can skip wait times.
tip8: Tip: By using s, you can cause a storm. This affects the world in several ways.
tip10: Tip: Remember to follow the balise!
tip11: Tip: All s (other than the tutorial) take place in the same world. Many of the things you learn will be useful more than once!
tip15: Tip: Some items, like a , are items that characters probably won't give to you willingly. You can, however, steal from them while they are asleep! You should see if anyone in the town is asleep in the mornings!
tip19: Tip: In fights, always try to keep your  as high as possible! This allows you to regenerate, which is very important!
tip21: Tip: Press %s to see a map of the world!
tip22: Tip: Don't forget that you can see a map by pressing %s!
tip24: Tip: Make sure you have Voix  and  enabled in the settings!
tip25: Tip: Trading with the  is never necessary, though occasionally helpful. He simply provides alternative ways to get certain items!
tip26: Tip: Don't forget to block by right-clicking when the Pépite de fers turn into Lingot de fers!
tip30: Tip: Don't forget about the balise!
tip32: Tip: In the 'Options' section, you can find several other useful functions. Use  and  to see more information about additional combat items. Use  to see which tamed animals will help you in combat. Use  and  for more information about enemies!
tip33: Tip:  are animals you have tamed in the world. Your strongest companion will help you during combat.
tip34: Tip: Here you can see the  of all participants of a fight. Participants with a higher frequency get more turns. You can increase your own  with potions!
tip35: Tip: Here you can see a list of effects enemies are strong (S) and weak (W) against. For example, a  will do considerably more damage against an enemy who is weak against fire than to an enemy who isn't. Enemies that are strong against fire will take very little damage from it and won't be set on fire. This affects all of the damage of all weapons that also apply an effect.
tip36: Tip: Items like Rapidité Potions can be used in combat to attack more often!
tip37: Tip: Most s are elemental weapons. Their name lists the elemental effect they apply. Check '' in '' to see what elements each enemy is immune or weak against.
tip39: Tip: Using '' you can escape from physical barriers placed on your character. Read the description in your inventory for more information!
tip41: Tip: You won because one of your pawns reached the other side or because the  does not have any available valid moves.
tip42: Tip: The piglins won't properly talk to you unless you wear full golden armor!
tip43: Tip: You lost because one of the 's pawns reached your side.
tip46: Tip: Maximum chat largeur (default) in Chat Settings is recommended.
tip47: Tip: During combat, you can flee using ''.
tip48: Tip: The  only works during combat.
tip49: Tip: You are attacking an enemy with an effect they are immune against. Make sure to check '' in '' to choose the best weapon.
tip50: Tip: Put items that you may not need anymore into Coffre de l'Enders, to make sure they can't be lost.
tip52: Tip: Remember that the balise shows where you need to go! Checking out what is there should always be the first thing you do!
tip53: Tip: Often a character can be found in the town that provides you with important information about the . Make sure you don't miss it!
tip56: Tip: These stories may contain more than just a grain of truth. Perhaps they aren't relevant to the current , but surely they still are worth investigating.

tutorial.2.a: Coffres are a good way to gain items,
tutorial.3.a: The entire map is very time-based.
tutorial.3.b: Most events, such as characters waking
tutorial.3.c: up, happen at the same time in all s.
tutorial.3.d: The sidebar shows the current time.
tutorial.4.a: Throughout the s, you will uncover
tutorial.4.b: new areas. It is always worth exploring them.

lobby.combat.msg.8: Change the difficulty of fights & the amount of enemies. Also adjusts the strength of armor and the bouclier. On Paisible, fights are skipped completely.
jukebox.name: Jukebox
jukebox.creator: by %s
fact.2: The 's book is actually readable if you read it backwards.
fact.3: The voice actor for the  character is actually one of the male creators making a funny voice.
fact.4: Crows seem to have taken over . No scarecrow can stop them now.
fact.5: Drinking a time potion while looking at the windmill looks quite amusing.
fact.6: The ending of the  changes depending on the number of survivors.
fact.7: Ruches can be collected by punching them.
fact.8: The  is the most popular character among the developers! In an average call, her voice line is repeated more than 5 times!
fact.9: Looking up the  of enemies can be a huge advantage in battles!

book.tr.content.1:
Today, my nephew,
Prince , left on a
diplomatic mission
across the sea. It's
the Prince's first
mission of this sort.
He is expected to be
back in around a
month. My nephew is
thrilled that he is
finally old enough to
go on these missions!
book.tr.content.2:
Two months ago, my
nephew left , our port
town, with a ship of
the royal fleet. He
was expected to be
back a month ago, but
still, we haven't heard
anything. King  has
now sent a letter to ,
the destination of .
book.tr.content.3:
I've never seen my
sister, Queen , so
worried in my entire
life.  sent a reply, and
never arrived there.
Tomorrow,  is sending
out all the 137
remaining ships of the
royal fleet to search
the entire ocean for .
book.tr.content.4:
There still has been
no word of . Many of
the ships have
returned, and none
have seen any sign of
. The King's advisors
tell him that ’s ship
must have sunk, but I
can see he has not
yet given up hope.
book.tr.content.5:
left a year ago, and
the entire royal fleet
is back now. The King
gave up hope as well,
there will be a funeral
soon. After hundreds
of years, this is
where the  family dies
out.  was the only heir
to the throne, except
if...
book.tr.content.6:
's funeral was today.
Everyone was
confronted with the
harsh truth that the
death of  was the
ending of the beloved 
dynasty. I do not know
what to do.
book.tr.content.8:
Today something
unbelievable
happened.  entered
the throne room. I'm
suspicious, the Prince
seems a lot colder
than he used to be,
but the King believes
it's truly him.
book.tr.content.10:
To honor 's return, a
banquet was held
today. The King
toasted to his son's
return, while he held
his beer high up, and
the sun, from behind
the King, made it shine
in a yellow-green
color. Today,  smiled
for the first time
since his return.
Maybe it really is him.
book.tr.content.11:
The King suddenly got
very sick. Old age, the
doctor says, but I
know he is wrong. The
king is old, but with his
perfect health, he is
supposed to have
many years left.
Poison. My suspicions
have been right. I'm
sure  or whoever he
actually is, poisoned
the king.
book.tr.content.12:
The King died, a
funeral will be held at
the start of the next
month. Perhaps the
King wouldn't like it,
because he is blinded
from the truth, but it's
time to start the
secret plan. The 
impersonator is not
the heir!
book.tr.content.13:
Only shortly after 's
funeral,  crowned
himself as 'Emperor of
,' claiming he couldn't
replace his father, so
he chose another
title. I've considered
leaving the capital, ,
or even the whole
Kingdom, but I'm more
helpful here!
book.tr.content.14:
The Emperor is a
cruel ruler, so cruel
that I was able to
convince my sister
that he is not actually
her son. She left  to
start a resistance
called '' while I try to
destroy the Emperor's
plans from the inside.
book.tr.content.15:
The Emperor seems to
trust me. He does not
know I'm 's brother. He
found out about  and
is now spreading news
about an organization
that is kidnapping
people - people that
are actually just
joining the resistance.
book.tr.content.16:
The Emperor is
planning to invade the
whole continent using
the old royal fleet.
"Sadly," we can't
afford it since there
does not seem to be
enough . Who could be
responsible?
book.tr.content.17:
- the Emperor's true
name, as he has now
revealed to the High
Council, his "trusted"
advisors like me, is
getting crueler each
day. I need to
proceed with my plans
right now... I need to
find 's hidden
illegitimate son, .
book.tr.content.18:
I'm on a mission to get
a loan so that  can
afford to conquer the
continent, but actually,
I'm looking for .
Supposedly, he is in ,
so that's where I'll
start my search.
book.tr.content.19:
I found out where 
lived. He left to find
his "kidnapped" sister,
, however. I assume
she left to join , so I
hope  will be able to
find TE and join as
well. I need to end my
search here and
return to the capital.
book.tr.content.20a:
This is it.  has found a
group of TE members
sneaking in the
sewers below the
palace placing
explosives. He
captured them and
executed them on the
spot, but not before
getting their names
and the position of
the TE hideout.
book.tr.content.20b:
and  were in the
sewers with them. The
s are dead. At last, I'm
abandoning my post in
the palace, I need to
save my sister at
least!
book.tr.content.21:
I know the TE hideout
is on an island, and
that's where  will be.
When I arrived in , the
whole city was
burning, however. I
won't be able to leave 
with a boat.  sent out
a ship full of killers
to the hideout and
then destroyed the
city.
book.tr.content.22:
is crazy. He is
destroying the entire
Kingdom. I haven't
returned to the
palace, but I’ve still
heard that the mission
to destroy TE has
been successful. I'll
go over the  to start
a new life. There is
nothing left for me
here.
book.tr.content.23:
I've arrived in a small
city called . It is
completely
surrounded by
mountains. I should be
safe here. I will tell
nobody of my past. 
seems to be fine with
ruling over a ruined 
so he shouldn't be
any danger to me
anymore.
book.tr.content.24:
I'm enjoying this
peaceful life in ... My
sister and I should
have never left 
Manor, we should've
never went to . But
now everyone I knew
is dead, my home also
destroyed, and the
kingdom I helped rule:
A ruin.
book.gary.2:
Okay, so it is blatantly
obvious that there is
a  happening here. It
seems every morning
the entire region
reverts to the state
that it was the
previous day. I have
also located some
potions that seem to
only affect my flow of
time.
book.gary.3:
I think this loop is
more complicated than
I expected. It is winter
now, somehow. I am
unsure what has
happened or how this
occurred, this is
unlike other s I have
encountered. Also of
note, I think someone
else is aware of these
s.
book.gary.5:
I was observing the
individual that seems
to dictate these loops,
and it seems that
there is a strange
portal to a realm
where time moves much
more quickly than
here. I am still not
sure if they are
aware of the s, I
suppose I may know in
time.
book.short.1:
There once was an
Enderman, who had
found a . Scared that
it would be stolen
from him, he went into
the deepest mine he
could find and hid it at
the highest location
he could see. Several
days later a waterfall
appeared and he
never went back. Is it
still there?
book.ose.content.1:
of , sitting atop his
throne, stares at the
scene before him. His
guards lie dead on
the ground, enclosing
the throne, and two
determined men
approach him, soon
followed by many
more. , the leader of
the rebellion,
book.ose.content.2:
is clothed in dark
robes, showing a
stark contrast to his
shining emerald eyes,
and their most notable
fighter, , a fierce man
with short black hair.
The Monarch realizes
this is where the 
Dynasty will end. Still,
he stands up and
approaches the men;
book.ose.content.4:
However, that
realization comes far
too late. He was not
expecting a rebellion
back then, and why
should he have? After
all, the  dynasty had
brought a long-lasting
period of prosperity
to the kingdom. Who
could've known 's
reign would be any
different?
book.ose.content.5:
Suddenly, the King
draws his sword and
unexpectedly leaps
forward with
remarkable speed,
attacking , and
causing a bleeding
injury.  slumps to the
ground, clutching his
injured side, a pained
expression visible on
his face. He turns to ,
who has
book.ose.content.7:
rebels staying away
from the fighting for
now. The King starts
advancing, a final time,
and strikes with his
sword. To no avail; His
attack is quickly
blocked by the Rebel.
They are very close
now, and  starts
retreating. Again, the
ruler prepares to
strike once more.
book.ose.content.8:
Then, all of a sudden,
the black-haired man
twirls around the
King's blade in an
attempt to strike the
monarch’s side. The
attempt fails; The
rebel's blade meets
the royal one, and
they quickly become
locked. Without missing
a beat,  uses the
opportunity and
promptly kicks his
book.ose.content.9:
opponent.  drops to
the ground, cursing
his attackers,
however, before he
can get up again, ,
having returned to
the fight, strikes him
through the heart. 
breathes heavily, still
clutching his injured
side, holding his
blood-stained sword.
The battle has
book.ose.content.10:
been won.  is spread
on the ground
lifelessly, staring at
the ceiling with empty,
dead eyes. His crown
lies nearby, having
fallen down from his
head during the
scuffles. The inset
gemstones, four s and
rubies, still brightly
reflect light, as if
nothing had happened.
The rebels
book.ose.content.11:
are standing around
the fallen body,
celebrating. One of
the intruders walks up
to the crown, picks it
up unceremoniously,
and puts it on ’s head.
The  Dynasty is over,
and at last a new era
has begun. Later, this
will be known as Year
0, the year that marks
the start of a new
book.ose.content.12:
royal family, the reign
of ’s lineage, now
dubbed heart, for the
final blow dealt to the
old ruler. A dynasty,
which leads  into a
period of peace, one
that lasts for
centuries. But in the
end, peace can never
last forever...
